title: UKG Pro Contract — Expiration Corrected to August 2027
summary: Corey J. Williams confirms items 40-43 are ready, noting item 40 (Mosaic Consulting Group UKG Pro implementation contract) involves no new money — funding comes from a previous budget line. The contract expiration date is corrected from March 2027 to August 2027.
raw_content:
[00:29:51] Williams has items 40 through 43 and
[00:29:54] those are also already.
[00:29:57] I want to make sure that we're noting
[00:29:59] that item number 40. Uh the one change
[00:30:01] to that is that the this is just going
[00:30:04] to be the contract with no new money.
[00:30:05] It's money coming from a previous budget
[00:30:08] line from last year, not new cash.
[00:30:11] >> Expiration date has changed.
[00:30:14] >> Expiring March 27th.
[00:30:15] >> Um August, right, Brian?
[00:30:17] >> August. So the short title is wrong. So
[00:30:19] it's supposed to be August. Okay.
[00:30:20] >> August.
[00:30:23] >> Okay, that's it.
[00:30:23] >> Are you all set?
[00:30:24] >> Yep.
[00:30:25] >> All right. Who's taking council?
[00:30:27] >> I'll take it. Thank you. Madam
[00:30:29] President, I have councelor Joe Rouser.
processing_notes: Brian mentioned re: expiration correction — likely budget or finance staff, not fully identified
Mosaic Consulting Group not in entity registry
Segment 7 of 9 from Common Council Study Session, Monday, February 9th, 2026
Transcript corrections applied: national grid -> National Grid
